calendar.matters:
MOTION To Determine Legal Fees After Trial
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GREGORY SULLIVAN MOTION To Determine Legal Fees After Trial is Off calendar for Department 302. The motion needs to be scheduled before Judge Donald Sullivan who presided over the trial. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for dismissal on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Gerard D. Launay, Esq. for and with the Defendat: Gregory Sullivan.
No appearance by Plaintiff Main Street Acquisition.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Defendant for judgment after court trial, no money judgment granted, plaintiff is entitled to recover costs pursuant to memo of costs and attorney fees after filing of motion for attorney's fee.
Judgment for defendant signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Set For Trial On Jan-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
